form.heading: Add New Client
form.toast_required: Please fill in client name, destination, and visa type.
form.toast_create_error: Failed to create client link. Please try again.
send.message: Hi {{name}}, please use this secure link to upload your visa documents: {{link}}
clients.heading: Real clients, real documents.
clients.link_ready: Client link ready — send it now
clients.empty: No clients yet. Add a client to generate their document upload link.
signin.title: Sign in to manage real clients
signin.body: Verified agent accounts only. Sign in with Google or your email and password to add clients and send them document upload links.
pipeline.heading: Every real client, every real stage.
pipeline.empty: Add your first client to see your pipeline build up here.
actions.heading: Action list
actions.empty: Nothing needs your attention right now.
actions.ready_for_review: Documents uploaded, ready for your review
portal.title: The feature that sells itself.
portal.description: Send one branded link. Clients upload real documents, follow their real checklist, and track real status from their phone — this is live today, not a mockup.
portal.whitelabel_body: The portal can use the agency logo, colors, and domain so clients experience the agency brand from start to finish.
templates.title: Built from your own real client history.
templates.description: The destination and visa type combinations you handle most, so the next matching client is one click to start.
templates.empty: Add a few clients and your most common routes will show up here automatically.
templates.add_cta: Add a client for this route
referral.title: Real signups, tracked honestly.
referral.description: Every signup via your code is counted here. When a referred client pays for Pro, you earn 15% of that payment — 20% if they pay for Expert. Commission payouts will activate once a real billing connection is in place; this shows the true number today, not a placeholder.
referral.sign_in_to_see_code: Sign in to see your code
license.title: Redeem a license code.
license.description: If you were issued an activation code (e.g. after a white-label application), enter it here to unlock your plan — no payment needed.
hero.h1: Your real business, in one place.
hero.subtitle: Every number below comes from your own real clients and documents — nothing here is a demo.
analytics.title: Business intelligence from your real pipeline.
analytics.description: Computed live from your own clients.
security.title: Real, account-scoped privacy.
security.description: What's actually true today — not a roadmap promise.
security.item1_body: Only you can see your clients and their documents — enforced on every request, not just in the UI.
security.item2_body: Every upload keeps its real upload date and label.
security.item3_body: Each client gets a unique, unguessable upload token instead of a shared inbox.
firstmin.h2: Feel the magic with one real client.
firstmin.subtitle: One real client, one real portal link, one real upload notification.
firstmin.step1_body: Name, WhatsApp number, destination in 60 seconds
firstmin.step2_body: One tap, the client gets it where they already are
firstmin.step3_body: Your dashboard updates live — no refresh needed
firstmin.step4_title: You review and move them forward
firstmin.step4_body: The pipeline reflects reality, not a demo
